productDisplayName: Nike Mens White Bleed Blue T-shirt
description: Composition:White knit t-shirtWash care:Machine wash separately in cold water with mild detergent. Do not bleach. Avoid soaking. Remove promptly. Line dry inside-out in shade. Warm iron only. Do not iron directly on print/embroidery.Fitting:Comfort FitA great mix of kitsch and cricket spirit, this white nike t-shirt by Nida Mahmood and Raul Chandra reflects the desi beat. Match it up with smart casuals and wear it to all sporting arenas and casual outings to add that desi tadka.
